domain_archetypes.name: kyten evidence replay
domain_archetypes.trigger: kyten signal changes while whole context is stale
domain_archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

domain_archetypes.name: whole boundary probe
domain_archetypes.trigger: whole handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
domain_archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

domain_archetypes.name: pitch regression harness
domain_archetypes.trigger: pitch behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
domain_archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

domain_archetypes.name: three operator packet
domain_archetypes.trigger: three output needs a human-readable audit packet
domain_archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
